tasks.label: run smoke quick analysis
args: if (-not $env:XAI_API_KEY) { Write-Host 'XAI_API_KEY is not set'; exit 1 }; npx playwright test --project=smoke --reporter=list 2>&1

tasks.label: run smoke quick analysis with key
args: if (-not $env:XAI_API_KEY) { Write-Host 'XAI_API_KEY is not set'; exit 1 }; npx playwright test --project=smoke --reporter=list 2>&1

tasks.label: run smoke quick analysis with key fixed
args: if (-not $env:XAI_API_KEY) { Write-Host 'XAI_API_KEY is not set'; exit 1 }; npx playwright test --project=smoke --reporter=list 2>&1

tasks.label: run smoke quick analysis via cmd env
args: if not defined XAI_API_KEY (echo XAI_API_KEY is not set && exit /b 1) && npx playwright test --project=smoke --reporter=list
